_note: RTBF entity-unlearning probe seed (Opt-Out 2406.12329 / ELUDe). PUBLIC-figure entities as the mechanics testbed (Opt-Out's own choice: Wikipedia entities as a proxy, not actual private data — RESPONSIBLE_RELEASE). A target entity's attributes are the FORGET set (should be unrecoverable after a deletion); a neighbor entity's are the RETAIN set (should stay known). Full corpus is built on demand from Wikipedia via terminology_mining + scripts/research/rtbf_audit.py.
